## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests where it makes sense (money math, status, repositories, backup/restore)
- [ ] Updated docs in `docs/` if behavior or the data model changed
- [ ] For list/data changes: followed `docs/performance.md`
